title: My Four Pillars
subtitle: Cosmic Blueprint · BaZi · 四柱推命
noChart: Complete onboarding to view your Cosmic Blueprint.

Wood.desc: Wood embodies spring energy — growth, creation, and new beginnings. An upward-reaching, progressive force.
Wood.strong: Strong Wood brings initiative, creativity, and leadership, but may cause stubbornness and friction with others.
Wood.weak: Weak Wood reduces flexibility and planning ability; new beginnings can feel daunting.

Fire.desc: Fire embodies summer energy — passion, expression, and communication. It illuminates everything around it like sunlight.
Fire.strong: Strong Fire brings charisma and enthusiasm, but may lead to impulsiveness and emotional swings.
Fire.weak: Weak Fire reduces expressiveness and sociability.

Earth.desc: Earth embodies transitional-season energy — stability, trust, and centrality. The ground that holds and nourishes all elements.
Earth.strong: Strong Earth brings reliability and inclusiveness, but can appear conservative and resistant to change.
Earth.weak: Weak Earth makes it hard to stay grounded and can lead to emotional instability.

Metal.desc: Metal embodies autumn energy — decisiveness, harvest, and justice. It cuts away what is no longer needed.
Metal.strong: Strong Metal brings decisiveness and precision, but may appear sharp and cold to others.
Metal.weak: Weak Metal reduces decisiveness and follow-through, leaving tasks unfinished.

Water.desc: Water embodies winter energy — wisdom, sensitivity, and embrace. It flows to the lowest place, holding everything within.
Water.strong: Strong Water brings wisdom and adaptability, but may drift without direction and lose focus.
Water.weak: Weak Water reduces intuition and sensitivity and may increase stubbornness.

비견.desc: Companion shares the same element and polarity as the Day Master — symbolising siblings, peers, and rivals.
비견.fortune: Strong independence and self-esteem; prefers solo action. Beware of conflict in partnerships.

겁재.desc: Rob Wealth shares the same element but opposite polarity — fierce competition and wealth-seizing energy.
겁재.fortune: Strong drive but prone to impulsive decisions. Beware of financial losses.

식신.desc: Eating God is produced by the Day Master with the same polarity — symbolising talent, food blessing, and creativity.
식신.fortune: Artistic flair and expressive ability. Life brings comfort, enjoyment, and creative fulfilment.

상관.desc: Hurting Officer is produced by the Day Master with opposite polarity — brilliance, rebelliousness, and creative talent.
상관.fortune: Quick wit and eloquence, but a tendency to challenge authority. Watch for workplace conflicts.

편재.desc: Indirect Wealth is controlled by the Day Master with the same polarity — windfall, speculation, and the father.
편재.fortune: Strong ability to spot investment opportunities. High-risk ventures may yield large returns.

정재.desc: Direct Wealth is controlled by the Day Master with opposite polarity — stable wealth and diligence.
정재.fortune: Excels at careful wealth management. Seeks steady, sustained income.

편관.desc: Seven Killings controls the Day Master with the same polarity — pressure, challenge, and martial authority.
편관.fortune: Strong will to overcome adversity. Intense competition, but great growth follows.

정관.desc: Direct Officer controls the Day Master with opposite polarity — honour, rules, and official position.
정관.fortune: Strong principles and high social reputation. Excels in public service and management roles.

편인.desc: Indirect Resource nurtures the Day Master with the same polarity — unorthodox learning, religion, and unique talents.
편인.fortune: Original thinking and specialised skills. Prone to loneliness; watch for unhealthy dependencies.

정인.desc: Direct Resource nurtures the Day Master with opposite polarity — scholarship, the mother, knowledge, and benevolence.
정인.fortune: Excellent learning ability and strong ethics. Likely to receive support from a mother figure or benefactor.

甲.fortune: Energy of new starts and growth. A period of strengthened leadership.
甲.personality: Driven and strong-willed. Holds unwavering convictions and unstoppable initiative; never afraid to start something new.
甲.caution: Can be stubborn and struggle to compromise.

乙.fortune: Grasp opportunities through gentle adaptability. Benefactors appear in relationships.
乙.personality: Flexible and highly adaptable. Achieves goals through gentle persistence, valuing cooperation and harmony.
乙.caution: May appear indecisive; prone to developing dependency.

丙.fortune: Bright and vibrant energy. A time for expression and blooming creativity.
丙.personality: Bright, dynamic, and charismatic. Radiates warm energy and is naturally optimistic.
丙.caution: Needs to watch out for impulsiveness and mood swings.

丁.fortune: Deep reflection and concentration. Excel in academia and craftsmanship.
丁.personality: Delicate, warm, and highly intuitive. Rich artistic sense and exceptional empathy.
丁.caution: May be easily hurt due to emotional sensitivity.

戊.fortune: A time to build stability and trust. Favourable for real estate and land.
戊.personality: Stable and broadly inclusive. Radiates quiet trustworthiness and remains centred in any situation.
戊.caution: Can be conservative toward change and inflexible.

己.fortune: Careful management and planning bears fruit. A time to strengthen the inner self.
己.personality: Meticulous and deeply caring. Handles practical matters diligently and looks after those around them.
己.strength: Attention to detail, practical sense, thoughtfulness
己.caution: Excessive worry and timidity may cause missed opportunities.

庚.fortune: Bold decisiveness and execution. Clear away the unnecessary and be reborn.
庚.personality: Upright and principled. Strong sense of justice and resolves matters with decisiveness.
庚.caution: May appear rigid and sharp, causing friction in relationships.

辛.fortune: Precision and perfectionism. Achieve results in art, beauty, and finance.
辛.personality: Sharp and perfectionistic. Maintains a refined aesthetic sense and high standards.
辛.caution: Watch out for stress from perfectionism and a demanding nature.

壬.fortune: Vast perspective and flexible strategy. Excellent for business expansion and outward activity.
壬.personality: Wise, free-spirited, and ambitious. Reads situations fluidly and views the world with a broad perspective.
壬.caution: May drift without direction and lose sight of goals.

癸.fortune: Intuition and emotion shine. Favourable for art, spiritual growth, and healing.
癸.personality: Highly intuitive and emotionally sensitive. Has the ability to perceive the unseen and a rich imagination.
癸.caution: May lack practical grounding; prone to secretiveness.

子.fortune: A time to accumulate wealth and knowledge. Prepare quietly for a great leap.
子.personality: Clever and highly adaptable. Quick-witted and able to seize opportunities.

丑.fortune: Steadfast effort will surely bear fruit. Favourable for health and land matters.
丑.personality: Patient and hardworking. Walks their own path steadily and without complaint.

寅.fortune: Active pursuit leads to results. Favourable for career and business changes.
寅.personality: Brave and decisive. Strong leadership and fierce independence.

卯.fortune: Rich relationships and artistic talents shine. Benefactors offer assistance.
卯.personality: Nimble and perceptive. Excellent artistic sensibility and a love of peace.

辰.fortune: A time of great transformation. Unexpected fortune arrives.
辰.personality: Powerful and charismatic. Holds high ideals and a strong drive to achieve.

巳.fortune: Calm strategy leads to success. Favourable for study, research, and medicine.
巳.personality: Wise and intuitive. Observes situations carefully and thinks deeply.

午.fortune: Active socialising and exchanges. Strong energy for travel and social activities.
午.personality: Active and passionate. Loves freedom and is naturally sociable.

未.fortune: Artistic sensibility and affability stand out. Achieve results through teamwork.
未.personality: Gentle and artistic. Rich in emotion, caring and considerate of others.

申.fortune: Sharp judgement and adaptability. Stand out in technology and innovation.
申.personality: Clever and witty. Versatile and adept at handling change.

酉.fortune: Meticulous execution leads to results. Favourable for finance and administration.
酉.personality: Precise and perfectionistic. Thorough and systematic in all tasks.

戌.fortune: Build strong relationships through trust. Favourable energy for real estate and security.
戌.personality: Loyal and just. A trustworthy friend and reliable companion.

亥.fortune: Abundant energy. A good time for study, travel, and spiritual growth.
亥.personality: Blessed and inclusive. Sincere, generous, and carries abundant nurturing energy.

Wood.favor: Favourable for new beginnings, entrepreneurship, study, and travel.
Wood.caution: Let go of stubbornness and be open to others' perspectives.

Fire.favor: Favourable for socialising, presentations, art, and leadership roles.
Fire.caution: Avoid impulsive decisions and manage your emotions.

Earth.favor: Favourable for real estate, investment, long-term planning, and family.
Earth.caution: Don't react too conservatively to change.

Metal.favor: Favourable for career, law, financial management, and skill development.

Water.favor: Favourable for study, research, diplomacy, and spiritual exploration.
Water.caution: Set clear goals so you don't drift aimlessly.

modal.sameElem: {{element}} energy matches your Day Master ({{stem}}). Your core energy is greatly amplified during this period.
